args: set -a; source "$HOME/ai-agent-stack/.env"; set +a; exec docker exec -i -e PAPERCLIP_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3100 -e PAPERCLIP_API_KEY="$PAPERCLIP_API_KEY" -e PAPERCLIP_HOME=/paperclip paperclip-safe bash -lc 'cd /app && node --import /app/server/node_modules/tsx/dist/loader.mjs /app/packages/mcp-server/src/stdio.ts'
